query:
SELECT 'contacts' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM contacts WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'deals', COUNT(*) FROM deals WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'accounts', COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'pipelines', COUNT(*) FROM pipelines WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'pipeline_stages', COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_stages WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'crm_tasks', COUNT(*) FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'deal_products', COUNT(*) FROM deal_products WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'deal_history', COUNT(*) FROM deal_history WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'lead_sources', COUNT(*) FROM lead_sources WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'campaigns', COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'loss_reasons', COUNT(*) FROM loss_reasons WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'product_catalog', COUNT(*) FROM product_catalog WHERE tenantId = 1;
